description: PostgreSQL index health monitoring – powered by pg-index-check

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (source_dsn_tag, schema_name, table_name, index_name)
    source_dsn_tag, schema_name, table_name, index_name,
    snapshot_at, idx_scan, seq_scan, n_dead_tup, n_live_tup,
    index_size_bytes, table_size_bytes
  FROM index_stats_monitoring.index_stats_history
  ORDER BY source_dsn_tag, schema_name, table_name, index_name, snapshot_at DESC
)
SELECT
  source_dsn_tag AS "Source",
  schema_name    AS "Schema",
  table_name     AS "Table",
  index_name     AS "Index",
  pg_size_pretty(index_size_bytes) AS "Index Size",
  pg_size_pretty(table_size_bytes) AS "Table Size",
  idx_scan       AS "Idx Scans",
  seq_scan       AS "Seq Scans",
  ROUND((n_dead_tup::numeric / NULLIF(n_live_tup + n_dead_tup,0))*100,2) AS "Dead Tuple %",
  CASE
    WHEN idx_scan = 0 AND seq_scan > 10 THEN 'REVIEW: index never used, high seq_scan'
    WHEN idx_scan = 0 THEN 'CONSIDER DROP: index has never been used since last stats reset'
    WHEN ROUND((n_dead_tup::numeric / NULLIF(n_live_tup+n_dead_tup,0))*100,2) > 20
         AND n_dead_tup * 8192 > 524288000 THEN 'ACTION REQUIRED: run VACUUM FULL or REINDEX (bloat > 500 MB)'
    WHEN ROUND((n_dead_tup::numeric / NULLIF(n_live_tup+n_dead_tup,0))*100,2) > 20
         THEN 'RECOMMEND VACUUM ANALYZE'
    ELSE 'OK'
  END AS "recommendation"
FROM latest
ORDER BY idx_scan ASC, seq_scan DESC

SELECT
  snapshot_at AS time,
  schema_name || '.' || table_name AS metric,
  seq_scan - LAG(seq_scan) OVER (
    PARTITION BY source_dsn_tag, schema_name, table_name
    ORDER BY snapshot_at
  ) AS value
FROM index_stats_monitoring.index_stats_history
WHERE snapshot_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND index_name = (
      SELECT index_name
      FROM index_stats_monitoring.index_stats_history AS sub
      WHERE sub.schema_name = index_stats_monitoring.index_stats_history.schema_name
        AND sub.table_name  = index_stats_monitoring.index_stats_history.table_name
      LIMIT 1
  )
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  snapshot_at AS time,
  schema_name || '.' || table_name AS metric,
  ROUND((n_dead_tup::numeric / NULLIF(n_live_tup + n_dead_tup, 0)) * 100, 2) AS value
FROM index_stats_monitoring.index_stats_history
WHERE snapshot_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
ORDER BY 1

title: PostgreSQL Index Health
